# hetzner_subnet_mac (Resource)

Manages a separate MAC address for a Hetzner subnet.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `ip` (String) The subnet IP address.
- `mac` (String) The MAC address to assign. Must be one of the available MAC addresses from the subnet.
